datasets.name: Beaversoft
datasets.command_text:
SELECT      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode, EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.UserID, EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo, 
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.EmpCode, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.AdditionalInfo, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.SubmittedAmount, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.Justification,
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimItemCode,  EC02_CLAIMITEM.ItemDescription, 
EC01_CLAIMCATEGORY.CategoryDescription,
HR_COMPANYDETAILS.CompanyName,
CONVERT(VARCHAR, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.LimitPeriodFrom, 103)    AS LimitPeriodFrom, 
CONVERT(VARCHAR, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.LimitPeriodTo, 103) LimitPeriodTo,
CONVERT(VARCHAR, EC21_CLAIMSPREHDR.SubmittedDate, 103)    AS SubmittedDate, EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.AppRejStatus, 
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.Approval1, EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.Approval2, EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.Approval3, 
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.Approval4,
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.AppRejDate1, 
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.AppRejDate2,
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.AppRejDate3,  
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.AppRejDate4,
Rtrim(ISNULL(M.CategoryCode7,'')) + ' - ' + Rtrim(ISNULL(C.DescShort,'')) AS DeptDesc,
RTrim(ISNULL(C.MapTo,''))  + Right('000000' + cast (EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo as varchar),6) AS RequestNo
FROM         EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP ON EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.CompanyCode = EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.ClaimPreReqNo = EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_APPROVAL1.UserID = EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.UserID 
INNER JOIN
                      EC21_CLAIMSPREHDR ON 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode =EC21_CLAIMSPREHDR.CompanyCode 
                      AND EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo = EC21_CLAIMSPREHDR.ClaimPreReqNo 
INNER JOIN
                      EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL ON 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode = EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.CompanyCode 
                      AND EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo = EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.ClaimPreReqNo AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqSeqNo = EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.ClaimPreReqSeqNo 
INNER JOIN
                      EC01_CLAIMCATEGORY ON EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimCategory = EC01_CLAIMCATEGORY.ClaimCategory AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode = EC01_CLAIMCATEGORY.CompanyCode
INNER JOIN
                      EC02_CLAIMITEM ON EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode = EC02_CLAIMITEM.CompanyCode AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimItemCode = EC02_CLAIMITEM.ClaimItemCode AND 
                      EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimCategory = EC02_CLAIMITEM.ClaimCategory INNER JOIN
                      HR_COMPANYDETAILS ON EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode = HR_COMPANYDETAILS.CompanyCode  
INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEEMASTER AS M
ON (M.CompanyCode=EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode AND M.EmpCode=EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.EmpCode)
LEFT JOIN HR01_CODEREF AS C 
ON (C.CompanyCode=M.CompanyCode AND C.Code=M.CategoryCode7 AND C.CodeType='CC4')
WHERE (EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.CompanyCode = @CompCode) AND (EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.UserID = @UserID) AND 
                      (EC_PRINTPRECLAIMFORM_TMP.ClaimPreReqNo = @ClaimReqNo) AND (EC21_CLAIMSPREDTL.EmpCode = @EmpCode)
ORDER BY EC02_CLAIMITEM.ItemDescription

children.text:
